provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Trade Act (Size of Enterprises) Order.

provisions.title: Size of enterprises
provisions.content:
2. Size of enterprises
The sizes of micro, small and medium enterprises, in terms of staff complement and annual turnover, shall be as set out in the Schedule.

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Trade (Exemption) (No. 1) Regulations.

provisions.title: Exemption*
provisions.content:
2. Exemption*
...
NB : Exemption provisions and name of the companies listed for exemption from the requirements of the Trade Act (Cap. 43:02) or Trade Regulations (Cap. 43:02 (Sub. Leg.)) not reproduced here owing to frequent amendments.
*The name of the companies exempted from the requirements of the Trade Act or Trade Regulations is not reproduced here owing to frequent amendments. For more information refer to Original Gazettes.

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Trade Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Trades or businesses to be registered

definitions.definition: a business which supplies goods for sale but does not keep any stock
a business selling stock feed, scheduled and unscheduled veterinary medicines, farming implements and farm wear, but not vehicles
a business which lets out, for use on the premises, computer games, pool and snooker tables, darts or any other related games
a business which sells goods by public auction
a business selling a wide range of baby products, clothes, toys and related accessories
a business selling stationery, computer and computer accessories, books or other reading materials
a business which washes motor vehicles and household goods, such as carpets and sofas, either manually or using an auto mechanical system
a business selling cellphones and related accessories, including cordless phones
a business which renders the service of general cleaning of premises such as shops, offices and residential property, including office and household goods such as carpets, sofas and curtains
a business which sells small scales tools and equipment, together with building materials, in small quantities
a business selling cosmetics, make-up, fragrances, beauty products and other related items
a business selling handicrafts, trophies, antiques and ornaments
a store which sells different categories of goods in different departments under one roof

a business which distributes goods from a warehouse, at a wholesale scale but does not include imported pre-owned motor vehicles, imported pre-owned earth moving equipment, imported pre-owned heavy duty machinery, imported pre-owned tractors, imported pre-owned motorcycles
a business which drills for water and may include the installation of drilling equipment
a business which is engaged in washing with chemicals, drying and ironing of clothes and textile materials
a business which receives and collects goods for dry-cleaning
a business selling a wide range of electrical goods, electrical appliances, video games and related accessories
a business selling flowers, live plants, dry seeds, treated soil, aquaria and other related gardening accessories, including vases, flower pots and garden ornaments
a business that primarily sells dairy products, fruits and vegetables, bread, meat and meat products, poultry and poultry products, seafood, seasoning and spices
an establishment which is engaged in the business of funeral undertaking, and may sell coffins, wreaths, flowers, grave covers and tombstones
a business selling moveable household and office furnishing, electronics and electrical appliances, carpets, bedding, linen and other related goods
a business which sells clothes, shoes and other accessories
a business selling a wide range of groceries and general merchandise, including unscheduled medicines or drugs
a business which lets out small machinery, tools and equipment, together with domestic and office implements
a business which provides fitness and body-building services through the use of related equipment and machinery and fitness lessons
a business selling fabrics, sewing machines and related accessories

a business in which a person's hair is cut and arranged, the services of pedicure, manicure, body massage, facial treatment and other related services are carried out, and which may sell hair and beauty products
a business selling a wide range of home and household items, including curtains, sheets, cutlery, crockery and gardening accessories

a business that sell imported pre-owned motor vehicles, imported pre-owned earth moving equipment, imported pre-owned heavy duty machinery, imported pre-owned tractors, imported pre-owned motorcycles including new or used motor spare parts, new tyres, lubricants and motor vehicle accessories
a business which sells large-scale tools and equipment, together with building materials in large quantities

a business which renders the services of document printing, typing, faxing, laminating, photocopying, internet and other related services, and which may sell printing and photocopying paper, recordable compact disks, recordable cassettes, memory sticks, computer ink cartridges and toner
a business selling a wide range of jewellery and related accessories
a business which is engaged in the washing, drying and ironing of clothes
a motor vehicle, earth moving equipment, heavy duty machinery, tractors, and motorcycles which were bought new locally or imported new
a token or related item representing money or an article of value
a business specialising in sight testing and selling contact lenses, spectacles, sunglasses and related accessories
a business which sells medicines or drugs, cosmetics, chemicals, chemical preparations, surgical goods, jewellery, goods for invalids, optical goods and infant food and products
a business which lets out heavy plant machinery, tools and equipment
a business that prepares and sells meals, refreshments and alcoholic beverages for consumption on the premises

a business that sells new and local pre-owned motor vehicles, new and local pre-owned earth moving equipment, new and local pre-owned heavy duty machinery, new and local pre-owned tractors, new and local pre-owned motorcycles including new motor spare parts, new tyres, lubricants and motor vehicle accessories
a business selling sunglasses and related fashion accessories
a self-service store which sells a wide range of food items, household goods and wines, but does not sell beer and spirits
a business that prepares and sells meals, refreshments and non-alcoholic beverages, for consumption off the premises
a business selling a wide range of toys and other related items

cooked traditional tswana meals including samp (setampa), sorghum (mabele), millet (lebelebele), fat cakes (magwinya), mophane worm (phane), chicken feet (menoto), chicken hearts, chicken necks, chicken heads, phaphatha, tripe (serobe), and pounded meat (seswaa)

a store which sells goods in bulk per product or line item but does not include imported pre-owned motor vehicles, imported pre-owned earth moving equipment imported pre-owned heavy duty machinery, imported pre-owned tractors, imported pre-owned motorcycles
a business that maintains and repairs motor vehicles and other machinery or equipment.
